category_sources: Official FIGlet homepage describes FIGlet as a program for making large letters out of ordinary text.
source_facts.description says figlet prints strings as ASCII art.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses the canonical display name FIGlet.
docs_sources: Official figlet.org homepage is the canonical project information page.
Official figlet.org provides the FIGlet Unix man page.
repo_sources: Free Software Directory also lists https://github.com/cmatsuoka/figlet as the VCS repository webview.
Official figlet.org says Git files are available in Claudio's FIGlet tree at GitHub.
tags_sources: Official FIGlet homepage describes large letters made from ordinary text.
source_facts.description says it prints strings as ASCII art.
